pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script injects this specific message string using the logger command and also by appending directly to /var/log/syslog.

pi_items.metadata_value: Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.
pi_items.verified_value: Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.
pi_items.source: task.json description directly asks for this text to be added, and verifier.py searches for 'Initial triage complete' and 'Escalating to L2'.
setup_task.sh injects the log with priority 'local0.emerg', which translates to 'Emergency' severity in EventLog Analyzer.

privileged_info_summary: The environment setup generates a synthetic alert with the text 'CORE_DUMP_DETECTED_001' and 'Emergency' severity via the syslog 'logger -p local0.emerg' command. The target note text 'Initial triage complete. Escalating to L2.' is explicitly required by the task description and checked by the verifier.
